this matters much from a practical point of view: the important thing is to use phrases while mine, etc are free-standing, used instead of noun phrases. None of possession. The  real difference is that my, etc function as determiners in noun the speaker's; mine replaces the more complex noun phrase the speakers pronouns, because they stand for noun phrases.
